title: Out of the Clear Blue Sky
posterAlt: Out of the Clear Blue Sky (2019) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Returning to Earth as an imitator, the legendary Mexican artist Pedro Infante must prove that he is no longer a womanizer to enter paradise.
synopsis: Out of the Clear Blue Sky (2019) is a comedy, drama and music film from United States. It carries a 6.5 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG13 certification (SG rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
